title: juncus engleri
intro: Juncus engleri, also known as Engler's rush or Chinese rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Juncaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Juncus engleri include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of fever, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Juncus engleri is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and potential side effects.
